channel.title: Ensamico Insights
channel.description: China sourcing, supplier, factory, trade show, and cross-border business guides.

item.title: How to Verify a Chinese Supplier Before You Pay
item.description: A practical step-by-step guide to checking a Chinese supplier’s legal identity, bank details, production capability, quality system, and commercial reliability.

item.title: Factory vs Trading Company in China: Which One Should You Choose?
item.description: Understand the practical differences between Chinese factories, trading companies, and hybrid suppliers—and how to choose the right model for your order.

item.title: How to Compare Chinese Supplier Quotations Properly
item.description: A structured method for comparing Chinese supplier quotations across specifications, MOQ, tooling, quality, lead time, payment terms, packaging, and total landed risk.

item.title: Preparing for a Trade Show in China: A Buyer’s Practical Guide
item.description: A practical planning guide for overseas buyers attending trade shows in China, covering exhibitor research, meeting scheduling, supplier evaluation, note-taking, and follow-up.

item.title: Common China Sourcing Payment Risks and How Buyers Can Reduce Them
item.description: Understand common payment risks when sourcing from China and learn practical controls for bank-detail verification, deposits, staged payments, inspections, and trade-finance methods.

item.title: What to Check During a Factory Visit in China
item.description: A detailed factory-visit checklist covering legal identity, production capability, quality control, subcontracting, capacity, warehousing, documentation, and follow-up.

item.title: How Overseas Buyers Should Follow Up After a China Exhibition
item.description: A practical post-exhibition follow-up system for organizing supplier leads, sending RFQs, verifying companies, managing samples, and turning booth conversations into sourcing decisions.

item.title: A Practical China Supplier Sourcing Checklist
item.description: A complete sourcing checklist for overseas buyers, from product definition and supplier search to verification, samples, contracts, inspection, shipment, and post-delivery review.
